pages.text: A defensive spellstone condensed from Etherium armor technology.$(br2)It hides worn equipment, reinforces physical defenses, and turns damage taken into power for the next strike.
pages.title: Etherium Core

pages.text: Activating the Etherium Core starts Etherium Shield for 20 seconds.$(br2)Cooldown: 40 seconds. While active, projectiles are reflected, incoming attacks are weakened, and attackers are knocked back.
pages.title: Active Power

pages.text: While worn, it grants +12 Armor and +10 Armor Toughness.$(br2)It also increases Armor by 20%, Armor Toughness by 40%, and grants 50% Knockback Resistance.
pages.title: Defenses

pages.text: When you take damage, the Etherium Core stores 40% of it and releases that stored force as extra damage on your next attack.$(br2)Stored damage has a cap to prevent unlimited buildup.
pages.title: Stored Retaliation

pages.text: While worn, it makes you immune to cramming, thorns, and explosion damage.$(br2)It also increases the Etherium armor shield health threshold by 50%.
pages.title: Etherium Protection

pages.text: The Etherium Core hides worn equipment by default.$(br2)Hold Shift and right-click the core to toggle equipment visibility.
pages.title: Visibility

pages.text: The crafting recipe for the Etherium Core.
